name: Omnibridge Holdings Limited
summary: Omnibridge Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides human resources outsourcing and recruitment services in Singapore and Hong Kong. It sources and employs suitable candidates that match the job requirement to perform job duties under client's direct instructions; and human resources recruitment services to employers seeking appropriate candidates generally for positions at all levels, including administrative, executive, managerial, and professional, to fulfill their needs. The company also offers other human resources support services, such as referral and parking services. It serves public and private sector clients, including Singapore government agencies and non-profit organizations. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong. Omnibridge Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Omnipartners Holdings Limited.
